---
title: "Software Requirements"
format: html
---


## Software

Here is a summary of the software that must be installed to use the FluvialGeomorph toolbox. 

* Windows OS (10+ recommended, Server 2019). ArcGIS desktop GIS applications are only provided by ESRI for the Windows platform.
* R Statistical Computing Language (4.x+ recommended)
* RStudio Desktop (2024.12.1+ recommended)
* ArcGIS Pro (3.2+ recommended) 
* FluvialGeomorph toolbox, latest version


## For more information on softwares and installations refer to the FluvialGeomorph [Tech Manual](https://fluvialgeomorph.github.io/FG-Tech-Manual/2-1-Install.html)
